steps: Contact Deutsche Bank Custody to request refund of EUR 3,093.75 overpayment on DBK dividend (account 801234567)
Submit formal claim citing DE-NO tax treaty Article 10 requiring 26.375% withholding rate, not 25% applied
Provide documentation showing Norwegian tax residency and treaty entitlement for reduced withholding
If custodian refuses, initiate BZSt refund procedure directly with German tax authorities

references.title: BZSt – Withholding Tax Relief (exemption & refund procedures)
